name: Curly Shepard
description: Curly Shepard is a major antagonist in S.E. Hinton's 1971 novel That Was Then, This is Now, and its 1985 adaptation of the same name. He is the younger brother of Tim and a member of the Shepard Gang. He is also mentioned several times in The Outsiders by Ponyboy Curtis, whom he is good friends with.
creator: RosesAndWine
